programme.desc: Sheldon tries to bond with Amy's father, but when Wolowitz lures Mr. Fowler away with magic tricks, Sheldon has no choice but to bond with Mrs. Fowler; Koothrappali and Anu try to get physical for the first time.

programme.title: Children Ruin Everything
programme.desc: In a mockumentary style episode, Astrid realizes how hard she was on Nisha during her teenage years and tries to make up for it by arranging something special for Nisha's surprise birthday party; James misses the good old days of work.

programme.title: Boston Blue
programme.desc: When a college basketball star is threatened, Danny and Lena race to protect them while solving a murder; deeply personal conflicts and moral dilemmas surface, forcing the team to confront difficult truths about loyalty, identity and justice.
